context.projectOverview: agent-bober — ESM/TypeScript multi-agent harness. This sprint collapses runSprintCycle's 7 positional params (pipeline.ts:158) into a single typed RunSprintCycleParams object. Pure mechanical refactor; runSprintCycle is internal (not in src/index.ts or MCP); zero behavior change.

completedSprints.title: Break critic-deep ↔ decomposer-deep cycle (DI)
completedSprints.summary: Cycle broken via runExpandStage injection + Outline leaf; 2815/2815 green. Unrelated files — no overlap with this sprint.

principles: See .bober/principles.md — ESM .js specifiers, `import type` (consistent-type-imports), no synchronous fs, unicode box-drawing section headers, collocated *.test.ts, conventional commits.
criticalNotes: MAP BY POSITION, NOT NAME: the production call site (pipeline.ts:931) passes a local var named `completedSprints` into the THIRD positional slot, which is the `completedContracts` parameter. When converting to the object literal, the field MUST be `completedContracts: completedSprints` (field name from the param, value from the local var). Read the call site carefully.
The 5 test call sites use the 6-ARG form (no pipelineRunId) — pipelineRunId is optional, so omit it from those object literals.

House convention (per curator): export an `interface RunSprintCycleParams` and destructure-at-top of the body, mirroring runAgenticLoop/AgenticLoopParams in agentic-loop.ts. Reuse the existing type imports already in pipeline.ts (SprintContract, PlanSpec, BoberConfig, ProjectContext) — do NOT re-import or guess.
Zero shadowing: the curator confirmed none of the 7 param names are reassigned/shadowed in the body, so a single destructure at the top is a safe drop-in.
runSprintCycle MUST stay internal — do NOT add it to src/index.ts or any MCP tool.
toolingNote: tokensave v6.1.1 available — prefer tokensave_context/tokensave_search before grep. Use `npx vitest run` (not bare vitest). The 6 known cockpit-integration E2E MCP failures are pre-existing — ignore.
